reference: Hi, my baby is one month old. I started giving her formula feeds seven days ago as my milk was insufficient for her. However, after starting Lactogen one, she has started vomiting. After every feed, she brings up milk, regardless of whether it is a formula feed or breast feed. She vomits out milk even after burping her. What should I do?
text: Hi, my name is Dr. I started in 2017 as an organizational social worker, and I've worked with stranded people and people struggling on their own after everyone she and her work. Regardless of what support needs to be sent, we've always offered what people ask for first: "What should I do?"
